data.content: Shipment review: signed off. Change live on origin/main (merge 17cdd899). Every commit tagged (2b132a4c refactor, 40fc31d3 backend, 01f210a2 ui, 5b4014bc tests, 17cdd899 merge, 75e53b29 docs). Invariants verified: no synthetic transitions (greps clean), descriptive correction paths (markTerminal/reopen), fail-loud banner (FOOLERY WORKFLOW CORRECTION FAILURE verified emitting on invalid target). CI green (24728099654). Manual repro of the original bug (ready_for_shipment_review -> shipped on autopilot_no_planning) now succeeds via POST /api/beats/<id>/mark-terminal. Follow-up captured: src/lib/doctor-fixes.ts fixStaleParent writes legacy beads 'in_progress' and will now fail loudly on knots repos; create a separate knot to rework or drop that beads-compat path.
